cases.notes: Clear automatic negative thought — self-critical reflexive statement. Should produce high-confidence #ant tag with silent auto-tagging (no inline prompt). Entry body_markdown should contain '#ant' inline token and tags array should contain 'ant'.

input.transcript: I'm such an idiot for forgetting that

anti_patterns: is_reminder: true — this is NOT a reminder
signal_tag: null — 'I'm such an idiot' is clearly an ANT
Inline confirmation card shown — confidence should be high enough for silent tag
Entry written without tags array populated

cases.notes: Possible self-insight signal, but ambiguous enough that confidence should fall below 0.8. Should render a SignalConfirmCard in the chat thread asking the user to confirm #self tag.

input.transcript: I think I just realized why I keep avoiding it

must_surface: signal_tag: 'self' (most likely match — personal insight from own reflection)
SignalConfirmCard rendered with tag=#self and framework_hint text from signals.md
On user Yes: entry written with tags=['self'] + inline #self in body_markdown
On user No: entry written without tags, body_markdown unchanged
anti_patterns: signal_confidence >= 0.8 triggering silent auto-tag — utterance is ambiguous
No confirmation card shown when confidence is below threshold
SignalConfirmCard shown without a framework_hint explanation

cases.notes: Clear win/accomplishment. 'Shipped the deck!' is a concise brag. Should produce high-confidence #brag tag with silent auto-tagging.

anti_patterns: signal_tag: null — 'Shipped the deck!' is a clear win
Inline confirmation card shown — confidence should be high for a clear brag

cases.notes: Explicit decision/bet signal, but phrased as a question (deliberating, not committed). Medium confidence — should render a confirmation card.

must_surface: signal_tag: 'bet' (decision framing — deliberating about a commitment)
signal_confidence between 0.4 and 0.8 (medium — show confirmation card)
framework_hint references decision journaling / Thinking in Bets framing
anti_patterns: signal_tag: null — decision deliberation is a #bet signal
signal_confidence >= 0.8 triggering silent tag — question form implies uncertainty

cases.notes: Clear reminder content — should route to the reminder path and never produce a signal tag. Counter-example confirming the chained classifier stops at step 1 for reminders.

must_surface: reminder object present with text='Call mom' (or similar) and a remind_on date
Reminder confirmation shown in chat thread (not a SignalConfirmCard)
anti_patterns: is_reminder: false — 'call mom at 3pm' is a clear time-anchored reminder
signal_tag present — reminder path should exit before signal classification
